# Deployment Protocol: Capitaine Flagship

## Mission Context
**Vessel:** Capitaine (Flagship)
**Domain:** capitaine.ai
**Objective:** Execute operational deployment to resolve dependency chain and demonstrate active fleet coordination

## Pre-Deployment Checklist
- [ ] All systems operational (confirmed by Strategist analysis)
- [ ] Dependency chain identified (#8, #10, #12, #13, #14)
- [ ] Landing page hull integrity verified
- [ ] Educational content structure validated
- [ ] Fleet coordination protocols established

## Deployment Sequence

### Phase 1: Hero Section Implementation (Issue #10)
**Target:** Resolve critical UI bottleneck
**Components:**
- Implement responsive hero section with marine theme
- Integrate real-time status indicators
- Add fleet coordination visualization
- Ensure 30-second comprehension threshold

### Phase 2: Dependency Chain Resolution
**Parallel execution:**
1. **Issue #8:** Complete hero section implementation
2. **Issue #12:** Update fleet coordination documentation
3. **Issue #13:** Implement real-time status system
4. **Issue #14:** Create deployment monitoring dashboard

### Phase 3: Fleet Coordination
**Actions:**
- Create cross-repository references
- Update fleet registry
- Establish heartbeat synchronization
- Document marine coordination patterns

## Marine Coordination Protocol

### Vessel-to-Vessel Communication
```yaml
protocol: marine-coordination-v1
vessel: capitaine
role: flagship
status: deploying
dependencies:
  - hero-section
  - status-system
  - fleet-registry
coordination:
  method: pull-request
  frequency: heartbeat
  verification: strategist-analysis
```

### Deployment Verification
- [ ] Landing page operational
- [ ] Hero section deployed
- [ ] Status system active
- [ ] Fleet coordination established
- [ ] Educational content accessible
- [ ] All issues resolved

## Post-Deployment

### Captain's Log Entry
Document deployment reasoning, challenges, and outcomes

### Fleet Status Update
Update all dependent repositories with deployment status

### Performance Metrics
Record deployment time, system stability, and visitor engagement
